revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 32x32 pixel-art game asset sheet, 1 row x 1 column, single frame, no borders or grid lines. Solid #FF00FF magenta chroma-key background fills all empty space with no gradients.

Subject: one small roadside Jizo statue as a single coherent field prop for a top-down 2D action RPG. Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette with warm golden-hour sunlight. The statue is centered and fills about 70% of the 32x32 canvas vertically, with a clear solid magenta margin on every edge.

Design details: small rounded stone Buddhist Jizo figure; smooth rounded head with a faint serene carved face; weathered gray stone; bright vermilion cloth bib tied at the neck; simple rounded pillar body in mossy gray-green stone; small mossy lichen patches on shoulders and base. At the feet, include two or three small smooth river pebbles and one or two tiny wild flowers, white or pink, tightly attached to the base as part of the same prop. A soft contact shadow pools directly beneath the base.

Pixel-art style: crisp low-resolution 16-bit SNES-style pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent palette, readable pixel clusters, one-pixel dark outline where useful, top-left light source with bright upper-left highlight on the rounded stone head and darker lower-right body shading.

Hard constraints: no cell separator lines, no frame border, no labels, no text, no watermark, no UI. No detached fragments, isolated pixel islands, dust specks, slivers, or leftover residue. Keep all visible pixels inside the single 32x32 cell and preserve clear #FF00FF margin. No characters or creatures beyond the statue prop. Avoid any Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, or Sakuna characters, logos, or likenesses; no samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, birds, companion creatures, letter emblems, modern text, watermark, or UI.
